close_reason: Replaced panic payload extraction with static message; variable no longer exists
description: In sign_sync (lib.rs line 72), the closure inside unwrap_or_else binds a local variable named msg to hold the panic string. This shadows the outer msg: &[u8] function parameter. The outer msg is no longer in scope at that point, so there is no data hazard, but a future refactor (e.g. logging msg.len() in the panic handler) will silently compile with the wrong 'msg'. Rename the panic variable (e.g. panic_msg or reason) to eliminate the shadow.
title: msg parameter shadowed by panic variable in sign_sync
